title: Puns
content:
A father once said to his son,
     "The next time you make up a pun,
        Go out in the yard
        And kick yourself hard,
     And I will begin when you've done."
meaning:
Exploring the themes of classic, Unknown delivers a powerful performance in "Puns"...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
